title: Conversation
description: A conversation thread between participants (users, AI agents, or human agents). Corresponds to a row in the `conversations` table. Platform indicates the channel on which the conversation takes place.

platform.description: The channel on which this conversation takes place.

name.description: Human-readable display name for the conversation.

organizationId.description: The organization that owns this conversation.

idempotencyKey.description: Client-provided key that prevents duplicate conversations from being created for the same logical thread.

metadataJson.description: Arbitrary key/value metadata attached to the conversation (e.g. campaign source, CRM fields).

analyticsJson.description: Analytics and scoring data aggregated from messages in this conversation.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the conversation was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the conversation was last updated.
